meta.name: Conversion Funnel Analyzer
meta.description: Load funnel step data, calculate conversion rates between steps, identify the biggest drop-off, and email a prioritized analysis.

parameters.content:
## 23 — Conversion Funnel Analyzer

**Required:**
- FUNNEL_SHEET_ID: sheet with columns: step_name, step_order, users_entered, period
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Every Monday at 08:00
**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: 🔻 Funnel Analysis {{ $json.week }} — End-to-end: {{ $json.overall_end_to_end_cr }}% | Biggest drop: {{ $json.biggest_drop_off.step_name }}
